subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the Dawning-Place of His signs and the Manifestation of His clear proofs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لمطلع الایات و مظهر البینات
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
